package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for transaction_error_translation_done_in_repository_and_handler: Both repository and handler layers translating the same transaction errors.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule207NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule207NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule207NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario207Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule207NegativeService, input Rule207NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
